MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brianna Mannion for petitioner San Francisco Public Administrator.

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Final Distribution.

The Court noted that the issues previously identified had been addressed to the Court's satisfaction and inquired regarding efforts to locate the missing heir. Ms. Mannion reported that continued efforts had been made without success and that, if located, the heir's share could be recovered through the County Treasurer.

The Court found that reasonable efforts had been made and took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
